description_long: This treadmill features a robust, rectangular frame with a wide, flat running belt supported by a solid base. The front section rises vertically and houses a control console with a digital display and several buttons, likely for speed and incline adjustments. The running belt is bordered by slightly raised side rails, providing safety and stability for users. The handrails extend from the console area, angling backward and offering support during use. The treadmill's color scheme is primarily dark gray and black, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance suitable for gyms or home garages. No visible power cord is present, and the overall design is streamlined with minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern treadmill with a wide black running belt, digital control console, and sturdy gray frame, featuring angled handrails and a sleek, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open frame, wide running belt, and the control console at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the running belt, the angled handrail, and the sloped console.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the running belt and the open frame structure.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the handrail and control console profile.
attribute_control_panel: The control panel is located at the top front of the treadmill, integrated into the console. It features a digital display screen and several visible buttons, likely for speed and incline adjustments. The panel is angled for easy access and visibility during use.
attribute_running_belt: The running belt is wide and long, occupying most of the treadmill's base. It has a smooth, dark surface with no visible markings or patterns, and is bordered by slightly raised side rails for safety.
attribute_handrails: The handrails are angular, extending backward from the console area. They are continuous and appear to be made of the same material as the frame, with no visible grips or padding.
attribute_display_screen: The display screen is rectangular, centrally placed on the control console, and appears to be digital with visible interface elements.
attribute_power_cord: No power cord is visible in any of the provided images.
